info.title: Stratum Control Plane API
info.description: Universal Tenant Context Engine - Control Plane

key.description: The plaintext API key. Only returned once at creation time.

get.description: Returns the health status of the control plane, including database and Redis connectivity.
List tenants with cursor-based pagination.

post.description: Create a new tenant. Optionally specify a parent for hierarchical tenancy.
Create multiple tenants atomically. Limited to 100 tenants per request.

get.description: Get a tenant by ID.

patch.description: Update a tenant's name, slug, status, or metadata.

post.description: Move a tenant to a new parent in the hierarchy.

get.description: Get all ancestors of a tenant in the hierarchy.
Get all descendants of a tenant in the hierarchy.
Get direct children of a tenant.
Resolve the full tenant context including inherited config and permissions.

post.description: Migrate a tenant to a different region.
GDPR Article 17: Hard-delete all tenant data. This is irreversible.

get.description: GDPR Article 20: Export all tenant data for data portability.
Get the resolved (inherited) configuration for a tenant.

put.description: Set a configuration value for a tenant. Creates or overwrites the key.

delete.description: Delete a configuration override for a tenant, reverting to the inherited value.

404.description: Tenant or config key not found

put.description: Set multiple configuration keys atomically. Limited to 200 entries per request.

get.description: Get the full inheritance view showing config at each level of the hierarchy.
Get the resolved (inherited) permission policies for a tenant.

post.description: Create a new permission policy for a tenant.
Create a new API key. The plaintext key is only returned once.

201.description: Created API key with plaintext secret

get.description: List API keys, optionally filtered by tenant.
List API keys that have not been used within the specified number of days.

delete.description: Revoke an API key, permanently disabling it.

404.description: API key not found or already revoked

post.description: Rotate an API key, revoking the old one and issuing a new one.

201.description: New API key with plaintext secret

404.description: API key not found or already revoked

get.description: List webhooks, optionally filtered by tenant.
Get a webhook by ID.

patch.description: Update a webhook's URL, events, secret, or active status.

get.description: List delivery attempts for a specific webhook.

post.description: Send a test event to a webhook endpoint.

get.description: Get aggregate statistics for webhook deliveries.
List failed webhook deliveries (dead-letter queue).

post.description: Retry all failed webhook deliveries in the dead-letter queue.
Retry a specific failed webhook delivery.

404.description: Delivery not found or not in failed state

get.description: Query audit logs with optional filters for tenant, action, resource type, date range, etc.
Get a single audit log entry by ID.

post.description: Grant a consent record for a subject within a tenant.

get.description: List consent records for a tenant, optionally filtered by subject.

delete.description: Revoke a consent record for a specific subject and purpose.

post.description: Create a new region for data residency.

get.description: List all regions.
Get a region by ID.

post.description: Create a new role with specified scopes.

get.description: List roles, optionally filtered by tenant.
Get a role by ID.

patch.description: Update a role's name, description, or scopes.

post.description: Assign a role to an API key.

404.description: API key not found or already revoked

delete.description: Remove the assigned role from an API key.

404.description: API key not found or already revoked

post.description: Purge expired audit logs, deliveries, and consent records.

parameters.name: retention_days
parameters.description: Number of days to retain data

post.description: Re-encrypt all sensitive data with a new encryption key.
